semantic_text:
Update ProfileUpdateScreen styling for improved UI consistency

- Adjust input field class to include text color for better visibility.
- Refine button styling by adding margin for improved layout.
- Ensure adherence to TailwindCSS utility-first approach and best practices.
Refactor dashboard and profile components to improve structure; replace Button with TouchableOpacity for better compatibility; remove unused imports and commented-out code for cleaner codebase.

Update RootLayout to integrate Android navigation bar settings

- Import and utilize setAndroidNavigationBar for theme adjustments.
- Simplify color scheme handling by consolidating logic in useEffect.
- Ensure adherence to best practices for code clarity and maintainability.
Refactor tailwind.config.js to improve organization and clarity by restructuring content and presets for better readability.

Refactor BackButton component for clarity

- Remove unnecessary whitespace to enhance code readability.
- Maintain adherence to best practices for component structure and formatting.

Add theme change functionality to ProfileThemeButton

- Integrate setAndroidNavigationBar to update the navigation bar based on the selected theme.
- Enhance the theme switching logic by storing the color scheme in AsyncStorage.
- Ensure consistency with previous updates related to Android navigation bar settings.
Refactor metro.config.js for improved readability; format module exports and ensure consistent configuration structure
Update go.sum to include new dependencies: go-runewidth, tablewriter, and uniseg, ensuring compatibility with recent changes in the project.
Update Node.js version to 18.20.6 in .tool-versions and README; remove unused app-v1 files and configurations

Refactor HomeScreen component for improved styling consistency

- Remove unnecessary 'native:' prefixes from Tailwind classes.
- Streamline button styles for Sign Up and Sign In links.
- Enhance overall readability and maintainability of the HomeScreen code.

Update HomeScreen text color for improved theming consistency

- Change text color class to 'text-foreground' for better alignment with theme.
- Maintain adherence to TailwindCSS utility-first approach for styling.
- Ensure overall readability and maintainability of the HomeScreen component.
Uncomment Stack.Screen in RootLayout for proper navigation setup
Add note to nativewind-env.d.ts indicating the file is generated and should not be edited

Refactor ProfileScreen component for improved readability

- Reorder import statements for better organization.
- Remove unnecessary whitespace to enhance code clarity.
- Ensure adherence to best practices for component structure.
update

Refactor NavTheme color values for improved consistency in theme-constants.ts

- Update light and dark theme colors for better readability and alignment.
- Ensure notification, primary, and text colors are consistent across themes.
- Maintain adherence to TailwindCSS utility-first approach for styling.
Refactor app.json and tsconfig.json for improved formatting; ensure nativewind-env.d.ts ends with a newline
Refactor tailwind.config.js to enhance readability by organizing content and presets, ensuring a clearer configuration structure.

Refactor DashboadProfile and Dashboad components for improved structure and styling

- Replace commented-out icon code with Ionicons for better visual representation.
- Enhance layout with a rounded background for the profile icon.
- Clean up imports in Dashboad component for better organization.
- Maintain adherence to React Native and TypeScript best practices.
Refactor app.json and metro.config.js to update asset paths; remove global.css and related components for cleaner structure
